meta.title: Contact
meta.description: Let's talk about your project and build a clear, functional and well-thought-out solution for your company.

hero.title: Let's talk about your project.
hero.description: Reach out here or use email, phone or WhatsApp. We'll respond clearly about scope and next steps.

form.lead: Fill in the fields and tap Send: your email app will open with the message ready to send to us.
form.validationRequired: Please add at least name, email and message.
form.submitOpenedMailto: If your mail app opened, just confirm send. If nothing happened, email us at {email}.
form.messagePlaceholder: Brief context of the project or need.

aside.title: The same team replies via email, phone or WhatsApp.
aside.locationNote: Remote and on-site projects depending on scope.

meta.title: Artificial Intelligence

hero.title: Artificial intelligence applied to business.
hero.description: We design AI solutions that connect with real processes to automate, assist, analyze and help make better decisions.

highlight.title: Useful AI, not decorative.
highlight.lead: We don't talk about artificial intelligence as a trend. We treat it as a tool that must solve, simplify and deliver real value.
highlight.panelBody: Customer service, operations, document automation, sales assistance, data classification and time optimization.

whatWeDo.title: What we do
whatWeDo.copy: We analyze your current situation, understand your processes and help you define which tools, platforms or developments make the most sense for your business.

whoFor.title: Who it's for
whoFor.copy: For companies that need more clarity before investing, changing tools, building a new solution or starting a digital transformation process.

meta.title: Custom Software
meta.description: We build tailored solutions for processes and operations that need their own logic and better fit.

hero.title: Software designed for how your operation really works.
hero.description: We build tailored solutions for processes, teams and business models that need something more specific than an off-the-shelf tool.

meaning.title: What custom means
meaning.copy: It means building a tool shaped around your operation, processes and goals—instead of forcing your company into a generic product.

when.title: When it makes sense
when.copy: When the process is highly specific, when existing tools fall short or when your operation needs its own logic to run better.

meta.title: Digital Transformation
meta.description: We guide your company's technological evolution with strategy, structure and execution focused on results.

hero.title: Digital transformation with order and purpose.
hero.description: We help companies evolve their operations, tools and ways of working with a clear vision and solid execution.

intro.title: More than technology—it's evolution.
intro.copy: Digitally transforming a company isn't just swapping tools. It's reviewing processes, improving structures and building a clearer, more efficient way to operate.
